query:
SELECT 
  s.id,
  s.supplierName,
  COUNT(sc.id) as confirmation_count
FROM suppliers s
LEFT JOIN supplier_confirmations sc ON s.id = sc.supplierId
WHERE sc.planId = (SELECT id FROM material_plans WHERE fileName LIKE '%1月5日-2月13日%' LIMIT 1)
GROUP BY s.id, s.supplierName
ORDER BY s.supplierName;
